T^T. #RT, -3THTCT" ^M*ft?I ("^Tfoffl), H ^ t w l I 3. ^ 3ff*RJ^T ^ £ TFsm 3 HcMJrH ^ t cfRte ^ JPfTT#ft I [ W U 12/15/2007-3TT^#Ht/^t3TTf] ^ F T l^TR, Tfg^?T T r f ^ MIMSTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th March, 2011 S.O. 567(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (I) of Section 22A of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (3 8 of 1949), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, number S.O. 789(E), dated the 20th March, 2009, namely :— 2. In the said notification, in Serial number (1), for the entries relating thereto, the following entries shall be substituted, namely :— "(1) Shri Justice S.N.Dhingra, Judge (Retd.), High Court of Delhi, New Delhi. —Chairperson" 3. This notification shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No. 12/15/2007-IGC/PI] RENUKA KUMAR Jt. Secy. 969 GI/2011 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
